Package index

Standings & Events

Team standings and game schedule

pll_standings()
Get PLL Standings
pll_events()
Get PLL Events (Games)

Player Data

Player statistics and free agency

pll_player_stats()
Get PLL Player Season Stats
pll_free_agents()
Get PLL Free Agents

Draft

Draft order and predictions

pll_draft_order()
Get PLL Draft Order
pll_draft_predictions()
Get PLL Draft Predictions
